steps.title: Find cause and effect
steps.content: The measurements showed that the tower was rotating in a concerning way. The next sentence says officials closed the area so experts could explore stabilization. The closure is a response to the concerning measurements.

steps.title: Choose the result signal
steps.content: A signals similarity, C signals an example, and D signals comparison. None expresses that one event happened because of the previous finding. The needed transition marks a consequence. The answer is B.
